message:
feat(core): add BOCPD change-point detector and conformal prediction intervals (br-347am, br-194ry)

BOCPD: Bayesian Online Change-Point Detection (Adams & MacKay 2007)
with Normal-Inverse-Gamma conjugate model. Detects mean/variance shifts
in streaming data via cumulative mass on short run lengths. 10 tests.

Conformal: Distribution-free prediction intervals (Vovk et al. 2005)
with sliding calibration window and guaranteed finite-sample coverage.
Uses nonconformity scores from median. 6 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
